posts.author: charbelnyc (Charbel Hajj)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello - I am trying to create an automation with the following receipe: When a new item is created > Send an email via outlook.
The board where I am adding this automation has a Connected Board column and I would like to add that Connect Board’s column value to the email text as a variable. But it doesn’t seem that we can include values from mirrored columns in email automations.

Any ideas or workarounds?

Thanks,
C

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @charbelnyc , I am not familiar enough with Monday.com automations to know if this is natively possible, but with zzBots you are able to automate when a item is created send an email with values from the item.

If you need more customizability or need help setting up, just chat with us on our website.
